title: Open Knowledge Format (OKF) v0.1
description: Frontmatter schema for OKF v0.1 concept files. OKF requires only `type`; all other fields are recommended, and unknown keys are explicitly tolerated. See https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog/blob/main/okf/SPEC.md

type.description: A short string identifying the kind of concept. Used for routing, filtering, and presentation.

title.description: Human-readable display name. If omitted, consumers MAY derive a title from the filename.

description.description: Single-sentence summary used for indexing and previews.

resource.description: A URI uniquely identifying the underlying asset. Absent for abstract concepts.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime of last meaningful change.
